# Republican Bob Hugin is tied in the US Senate race in New Jersey!
Door-to-door canvassers are needed to help Get Out The Vote. Make your own schedule and work when you have extra time. [Apply now through this link and show Bob Hugin that you are on his team and ready to work to get him elected!](https://grassroots-newjersey.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4327e351fddf48f80cd179396&id=543e2b09ab&e=93a16a8918)

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: 4 weeks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We hope you can take a minute to read Tom's note about the important four weeks ahead. Because this really is crunch time, and we really do need all hands on deck to win this thing.
Hey there, team -- we hope you can take a minute to read Tom's note about the important four weeks ahead. Because this really is crunch time, and we really do need all hands on deck to win this thing. Because we will NOT win this race without you -- we repeat, we will NOT win this race without you. **Wendy Rogers,_an extremist who opposes Social Security_ , is trying to unseat Tom so she can push through the far-right's unpopular agenda, and we can't let that happen.** [**Make a donation today to arm us with the resources we need to bring this thing home in four weeks.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran \-----forwarded message----- From: Tom O'Halleran Subject: can you help, friends? Can you help me out today, friends? It's that time here on the campaign trail: We're so close to the election that my team is counting down the days until November 6th. **And, as of today, we 're 28 days --_exactly four weeks_ \-- out.** And my far-right opponent recently released a shock poll claiming a small lead, so it's going to be all hands on deck here in AZ-01 all the way through the end. [**Can you help me end this race strong and regain the lead with a donation today, friends? Because when I say it 's all hands on deck, I mean we're really counting on this entire grassroots team to power us through.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$25](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$50](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [Other](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's a bit hard to believe that we're already four weeks out from Election Day. Just two years ago, we were entering the final stretch of my first campaign for Congress, and the time since, when I've had the distinct honor of representing Arizonans in Washington, has absolutely flown by.

But we really are in the final stretch now, friends, and we have a lot of work ahead of us. We must tell every last voter in our district about the work I'm doing for them in Congress, and we must get our supporters to the polls to make sure this seat stays blue.

**As the most vulnerable Democrat in the House,** I am taking nothing for granted. I hope you won't either. [**Make a donation today if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.09_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

Thanks for having Tom's back!

Peter,

**We are in the stretch run!** Our campaign has reached tens of thousands of voters in the 10th Congressional District. Other campaigns, including Beto O'Rourke's, have reached tens of thousands more. Activists have registered a record number of Texas voters. **Now, with four weeks to go, we have one job: get our supporters to the polls.** Whether you are here in the Texas 10th or supporting from afar, there is a lot you can do to help. Here are five ways to push us to victory:
1. **Join our canvass teams to reach voters at the door.** We have four regional field directors leading teams of volunteers and staff across nine counties. **[To reach voters in your area, sign up to volunteer today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2566033/15196297/-730118111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk0YmQ4MS04ZmNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUNpnQWtbvweZZvf4yWt0H5EmEm46rK1_d1gwAMBH6A=)**!

2. **Help us call voters**. We have a phonebank system that works best when multiple people are calling at the same time. All you need is a phone and a computer, and you can call from anywhere. Contact our phonebank coordinator, Andrew Dysert, at andrew@siegelfortexas.org to get involved!

3. **Help us text voters**. For voters with cell phones, we can text reminders to vote and share brief messages about my campaign. This is a good tactic to increase my name recognition as well. The texting is done through an easy-to-use computer program. To join our text team, contact Ben Deatrick at ben@siegelfortexas.org.

4. **Share our digital ads and messages**. If you haven't already, visit our **[Facebook page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2566034/15196298/729498802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk0YmQ4MS04ZmNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUNpnQWtbvweZZvf4yWt0H5EmEm46rK1_d1gwAMBH6A=)** and **[Twitter account](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2566035/15196299/-1886619472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk0YmQ4MS04ZmNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUNpnQWtbvweZZvf4yWt0H5EmEm46rK1_d1gwAMBH6A=)** , and share our messages with every TX-10 voter you know!

5. **Donate today**. With every dollar we raise, we can hire more staff, and send our mail and digital ads to a larger universe of voters. **[Contribute $20 or more today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2566036/15196300/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk0YmQ4MS04ZmNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUNpnQWtbvweZZvf4yWt0H5EmEm46rK1_d1gwAMBH6A=)**!

A huge thank you to everyone who has participated in this campaign. With your help, we can shock the world on November 6, and unseat one of the wealthiest Republicans in Congress! Onward,
Mike

subject: President Trump Declares State of Emergency in Florida Ahead of Hurricane Michael
body:
| |
---
#
# _President Trump Declares State of Emergency in Florida Ahead of Hurricane Michael_
#
President Donald J. Trump declared a state of emergency in Florida yesterday as the state prepares for Hurricane Michael to make landfall in the coming hours, Brett Samuels reports for _The Hill_. “The emergency declaration, which is retroactive to Sunday, will provide additional federal assistance and resources to Florida in its preparation and recovery efforts,” Samuels writes. “The measure also includes additional debris removal and emergency protective assistance to several counties that are expected to be hardest hit by the storm, including Gulf, Hamilton, Jackson, Jefferson, Madison and Suwannee.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDM1MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjAzNTM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4MjMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/410615-trump-declares-state-of-emergency-in-florida-ahead-of-hurricane) In _The Salt Lake Tribune_ , [**Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta and the U.S. Surgeon General Jerome Adams**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDM1MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjAzNTM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4MjMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/helping-americans-sidelined-opioid-addiction-drug-use-get-back-work/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) point out that the opioid crisis has been crippling for many Americans, ultimately keeping them out of the growing workforce. “President Trump has declared the opioid epidemic a national public health emergency, committing the full resources of his Administration to helping Americans impacted by opioid addiction,” they write. “Secretary of State Mike Pompeo said Tuesday he made ‘real progress’ in his latest meeting with North Korean dictator Kim Jong Un, and said he believes the two countries are back on a path toward denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula,” Joel Gehrke reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDM1MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjAzNTM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4MjMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/defense-national-security/pompeo-sees-path-to-denuclearization-after-north-korea-meeting). At the White House, Secretary Pompeo told reporters that “while there's still a long way to go and much work to do, we can now see a path to where we'll achieve the ultimate goal, which is the full and final verified denuclearization of North Korea.” In [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDM1MzcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjAzNTM3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4MjMxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://thehill.com/blogs/congress-blog/economy-budget/410572-small-business-administration-re-doubles-efforts-in), Allen Gutierrez—Associate Administrator for the Office of Entrepreneurial Development at the Small Business Administration—writes that SBA Administrator Linda McMahon has been re-doubling efforts to support Hispanic entrepreneurs. “The Trump administration is committed to providing Hispanic entrepreneurs with not only the resources they need to succeed, but also the right policies. Hispanic Americans are better off economically today than they were before this administration’s policies were put in place.”

name: Benjamin B. [field organizer]
subject: It's time to sign up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

The parades are almost over. The signs are going up. And thousands of people across Minnesota are already voting. **[It's time to sign up for a shift and help your neighbors make a plan to vote in this critical election.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qdTiLhh35pDrR14v5w%2BMZfP2QL2l05zU)**

We don't have much time before Election Day, and that's why **[we've made it so easy to sign up online to make phone calls or knock on doors at your local office.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vPjSU35DhGfsQrAL831C3%2FP2QL2l05zU)**

This is one of the most important things you can do in this election -- but there isn't much time left. I don't want to regret anything when the polls close on November 6th, and I'm pretty sure you don't either.

Like everyone on Team Klobuchar, I'm looking forward to seeing thousands of volunteers come out during this big weekend.

See you soon,

\-- Benjamin B.

PS -- We only have four weekends left before Election Day and Minnesotans are already voting -- now is the perfect time to **[sign up to volunteer.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Wpclr7O82%2FTHq0%2F1qoSpK8McPaDYxLGw)**

[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yuZN5rzQeFSU5abuFdzePPP2QL2l05zU)
---

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Standing Up for Northwest Arkansas
body:
Friend,
It's Wednesday morning, but I'm still riding high from my debate with Steve Womack. Unlike most folks in Northwest Arkansas, I got to talk issues with our congressman face to face. I am so grateful to be able to deliver the message for working families, farmers, seniors and the small businesses that make up the 3rd district. I did my best to lay out the vision for our communities and our country that we talk about everyday on front porches and in diners and at events from Fayetteville to Fort Smith and all points in between.
_**One thing I noticed was that Congressman Womack stuck by his values. He made the case to Arkansans that tax cuts for millionaires matter more than fully funding Medicare for seniors. Womack defended his position to make healthcare more difficult to access if you have a pre-existing condition. And Steve Womack never mentioned once why he won't vote to renew the Violence Against Women Act, that protects our mothers, wives, daugthers and sisters from domestic abuse.**_
Those might be his values, but they aren't mine and I know they aren't yours. The debate shows you two different people with very different views of who we are and who we can become. I hope that you side with me.
I have set a goal to raise $10,000 in online contributions by this Friday. Since the debate, we have felt a shift in momentum and we need to capitalize on it. I need you and your friends and co-workers and anyone else concerned about our country to chip in today. Can I count on you to help me hit this goal? With less than 30 days away from election day, I need you more than ever before.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2569380/15219896/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ5OGExMS1hNWNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMpoGqjhsNdwfl2fo39kNktYmz0Ss3_oCgwr4-nhPWw=)
Josh

If you believe you received this message in error, please unsubscribe to this list.
Mahony for Congress
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/29feb5da-93cc-e811-af11-2818784f20f6/9ad98a11-a5cc-e811-af11-2818784f20f6?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ5OGExMS1hNWNjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMpoGqjhsNdwfl2fo39kNktYmz0Ss3_oCgwr4-nhPWw=&id=110671788&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

body:

>

There is so much at stake, and we just can't afford to sit on the sidelines while someone else decides our future for us.

> Thanks for taking action,
> Mike

subject: It's time to vote!

body:
Busy on Election Day? Vote early! CLICK or TAP here! >> | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/final-push-to-election-day-467333?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b29e5a81b8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friend,

We're moving into fall, and that means that it's time to vote.

November 6th is under a month away and it's up to you and other steadfast conservatives to keep the great state of Indiana RED in these elections.

But you lead a busy life, and you may not be able to get to the polls on Election Day. Don't worry - you have two options.
1. Vote Early – [**click here**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8134ec0993&e=1acd9bb3d6) to find the closest place for you to vote early
2. Vote by Mail – [**click here**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef29e07cbe&e=1acd9bb3d6) to request your ballot by mail

Indiana's future is up for grabs and we need to show Democrats like Joe Donnelly that we want a REAL LEADER like rock-solid CONSERVATIVE Mike Braun in office.
---
| | [Click here to request your ballot](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d50c2dfbca&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Click here to request your ballot")

Thanks,
Team Indiana GOP

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: It’s go time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Yesterday was the last day for Texans to register to vote. Which means
today, we’re officially in the final sprint of our campaign: get out the
vote. GOTV.

We’ve known this from the beginning: winning in November was never going
to be easy. We’re going to work more hours and knock on more doors than
any campaign in Texas history and we have the people, plan and
infrastructure in place to make it happen.

We have to do it. Not just for Beto, not just for Texas -- the future of
our country is on the line. We must channel all of our energy and efforts
into this race and win it.

To pull off this historic win, we’ve organized the largest GOTV program in
Texas history. We’re going to talk to a HUGE number of Texans about Beto’s
campaign and why it’s critical they vote. It’s going to take unprecedented
people power.

And, to be blunt, people power takes resources. And right now, we’re
falling behind on our October fundraising goals.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181010&t=1019&akid=17008%2E444211%2E3RsG1b ]Can Beto and our team count on you to step up today with a contribution of
$3
right now? Help us reach as many Texas voters as we can before Early
Voting starts on October 22.

Thanks for your support. Let’s go.

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Sneak Peek: New Campaign Ad!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
As a supporter of our campaign, we wanted to give you the first look at our new ad! This is the video we’ll be launching on TV soon and, with your help, we can keep it on the air all the way through Election Day. **Click on the image below to be among the first to see the new ad and please contribute what you can to help us keep it on TV!**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2572553/15246558/-832482921?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Q1NjAwMC1iN2NjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mvz2Qst5TC892paM7B4hBsZzK2nszLQS6bb7YGAFEU=)**
This ad is titled “Showing Up,” because Steve King doesn’t show up. He won’t do town halls, he won’t go to publicly scheduled events, he won’t meet with newspaper editorial boards, and he refuses to debate J.D. King doesn’t show up for agricultural or small business committee hearings, and he’s not even on the farm bill conference committee. **He simply doesn’t show up!**
**But J.D. Scholten does.** He’s already done two 39-county tours, and is in the middle of his third—holding an open-to-all town hall in every county in the district, a tour appropriately title “You Can’t Fake Showing Up.” And he is committed to working just as hard as our representative as he does as a candidate. **It’s time to elect someone who will actually show up for the people of our district. **

body:

name: rapidresponse@stevesisolak.com
subject: POLL ALERT: “Races in Nevada are a dead heat”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
But NBC has Laxalt beating Steve by one.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ufNjUgQPTdDNUblYtNTuasb1HXKoN_hM2urqW0gmDMw=/J59dV5FKw1tIQ4G_5046917Xq7mEqqIsfy30e7jtwtk=?gpsid=37_57_4315&refcode=em18_181010_NBCpol_LG_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_NBCpol_LG_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

**NEW POLL:
"Republican Adam Laxalt gets support from 46 percent of likely voters, compared with 45 percent for Democrat Steve Sisolak."**
--_NBC News_ , October 9, 2018

This race is a dead-heat. Chip in to help Steve finish strong these last few weeks >>
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ufNjUgQPTdDNUblYtNTuasb1HXKoN_hM2urqW0gmDMw=/J59dV5FKw1tIQ4G_5046917Xq7mEqqIsfy30e7jtwtk=?gpsid=37_57_4315&refcode=em18_181010_NBCpol_B1_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_NBCpol_B1_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Dear Friend,

Polls don't vote, people do. But this one shows that the momentum might be starting to slip away from us!

_NBC_ released results from their latest poll that has Steve trailing Laxalt by just one point. Remember, a couple weeks ago _CNN_ had Steve UP four. We've been seeing momentum slip in races across the country and now it's hit Nevada. We can't afford to lose steam now - **we have to push back against this trend and keep the momentum up!**

**[This election is now a race against the clock. We're planning our get-out-the-vote effort to close the door on Laxalt, so we need to know if we can count on your support. Please donate right now if you're with Steve.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ufNjUgQPTdDNUblYtNTuasb1HXKoN_hM2urqW0gmDMw=/J59dV5FKw1tIQ4G_5046917Xq7mEqqIsfy30e7jtwtk=?gpsid=37_57_4315&refcode=em18_181010_NBCpol_L1_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_NBCpol_L1_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Voters need to hear the truth.

That means getting the word out about Steve's record of success as a public servant and his plans to keep Nevada moving forward. It also means telling the truth about lackey Laxalt's hobnobbing with his dark money, special interest allies, like the billionaire Kochs and Washington Republicans like Pence and Trump.

Steve is here for us, fighting for the working people of Nevada. But we're running out of time to get that message out to voters.

**[Help us out before it's too late, please. Contribute $11.06 to help Steve get ahead on November 6th.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ufNjUgQPTdDNUblYtNTuasb1HXKoN_hM2urqW0gmDMw=/J59dV5FKw1tIQ4G_5046917Xq7mEqqIsfy30e7jtwtk=?gpsid=37_57_4315&refcode=em18_181010_NBCpol_L2_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_NBCpol_L2_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thanks,

Team Sisolak

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ufNjUgQPTdDNUblYtNTuasb1HXKoN_hM2urqW0gmDMw=/J59dV5FKw1tIQ4G_5046917Xq7mEqqIsfy30e7jtwtk=?gpsid=37_57_4315&refcode=em18_181010_NBCpol_B2_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_NBCpol_B2_fnd_gq_act__TSRR_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK

name: Khizr Khan
subject: I sent this note to Senator Kaine's team to pass on to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | _Derek, I wrote this note to Senator Kaine 's campaign manager, Keren, and asked if she and her team could share this with the Senator and all of you. I know it is long, but I hope you will read it through the end.

I wrote it because I am honored to have a leader like Senator Kaine represent me, and I am proud to do whatever I can to show him my gratitude by helping him serve another term in the Senate. If you are willing to help alongside me, [please click here to make a donation after reading my email](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b4c5/2210261312/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+please+click+here+to+make+a+donation+aft&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND"). Thank you._
* * *
**If you will let me speak on behalf of thousands of Virginians for a moment, I would like to say this:**

Senator Kaine, we love you, we honor your leadership, moral and ethical courage, and true reflection of Virginia values. We honor your service to Virginians and we honor your family's exemplary service to our beloved state.

**To briefly mention some of your service to Virginians and our nation:**
* \-- For your recent successes in getting Virginia Indian tribes federal recognition, we Virginians are grateful;
* \-- For your continued leadership on comprehensive immigration reform, we Virginians are grateful to stand with you so that we can continue to attract talented people from around the world;
* \-- For your leadership on supporting marriage equality, we Virginians are grateful;
* \-- For your continued leadership on behalf of Virginians to protect our children and communities from gun violence, we stand with you;
* \-- We Virginians stand with your hard work to make college affordable and to create meaningful technical and apprenticeship opportunities for Virginians;
* \-- We are grateful to you for your continued work to reduce unemployment among our veterans and military spouses;
* \-- And we Virginians stand with you for your leadership to reduce prescription drug costs and provide Virginians with more health care options.

Last November, we Virginians decided to take our destiny in our hands - _we went to vote._ Following your example we have kept civility in our discourse - we have stayed away from name-calling politics, unlike the Republican candidate.

We are cautiously optimistic that decency, civility, and Virginia values will prevail in upcoming elections. We are not taking anything for granted - we will get to polling stations on time to vote and make sure our families and friends do the same.

Senator, you have taught us well by your own example, and we assure you that we stand with you, support you, and want you back to the Senate to defend Virginia values, defend our democracy, and defend us as more tumultuous times lie ahead.

**Now, my fellow Virginians, I turn to you: Our time has come to proudly stand with our Senator and support his campaign by our most generous contributions and by our vote on[November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b4d8/2210261312/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND")**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b4dd/2210261312/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND")

God bless our Virginia and our United States of America.

Most respectfully,

_Khizr Khan_ | _The campaign is currently working towards a goal of $50,000 to put into a[Get Out the Vote Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b4d2/2210261312/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Get+Out+the+Vote+Fund&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND") that will help register Virginians to vote before the [October 15th deadline.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b4d5/2210261312/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+October+15th+deadline&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND") They have $34,164 more to go and would appreciate if you could help contribute to that fund below:_
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b4d4/2210261312/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND")

| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1011/3e0906/763b0fe2/3e37b72f/2210261312/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND&source=20181010_1_FR_Khan_Oct-Surrogate-LDND")

---

* * *
"Nowhere but in the United States is it possible that an immigrant who came to the country empty-handed only a few years ago gets to stand in front of patriots and in front of a major political party ... It is my small share to show the world, by standing there, the goodness of America."

* * *
|

clean_body: | | Derek, I wrote this note to Senator Kaine 's campaign manager, Keren, and asked if she and her team could share this with the Senator and all of you. I know it is long, but I hope you will read it through the end. I wrote it because I am honored to have a leader like Senator Kaine represent me, and I am proud to do whatever I can to show him my gratitude by helping him serve another term in the Senate. If you are willing to help alongside me, "". Thank you. If you will let me speak on behalf of thousands of Virginians for a moment, I would like to say this: Senator Kaine, we love you, we honor your leadership, moral and ethical courage, and true reflection of Virginia values. We honor your service to Virginians and we honor your family's exemplary service to our beloved state. To briefly mention some of your service to Virginians and our nation: \-- For your recent successes in getting Virginia Indian tribes federal recognition, we Virginians are grateful; \-- For your continued leadership on comprehensive immigration reform, we Virginians are grateful to stand with you so that we can continue to attract talented people from around the world; \-- For your leadership on supporting marriage equality, we Virginians are grateful; \-- For your continued leadership on behalf of Virginians to protect our children and communities from gun violence, we stand with you; \-- We Virginians stand with your hard work to make college affordable and to create meaningful technical and apprenticeship opportunities for Virginians; \-- We are grateful to you for your continued work to reduce unemployment among our veterans and military spouses; \-- And we Virginians stand with you for your leadership to reduce prescription drug costs and provide Virginians with more health care options. Last November, we Virginians decided to take our destiny in our hands - we went to vote. Following your example we have kept civility in our discourse - we have stayed away from name-calling politics, unlike the Republican candidate. We are cautiously optimistic that decency, civility, and Virginia values will prevail in upcoming elections. We are not taking anything for granted - we will get to polling stations on time to vote and make sure our families and friends do the same. Senator, you have taught us well by your own example, and we assure you that we stand with you, support you, and want you back to the Senate to defend Virginia values, defend our democracy, and defend us as more tumultuous times lie ahead. Now, my fellow Virginians, I turn to you: Our time has come to proudly stand with our Senator and support his campaign by our most generous contributions and by our vote on "" "" God bless our Virginia and our United States of America. Most respectfully, Khizr Khan | The campaign is currently working towards a goal of $50,000 to put into a "" that will help register Virginians to vote before the "" They have $34,164 more to go and would appreciate if you could help contribute to that fund below: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" "Nowhere but in the United States is it possible that an immigrant who came to the country empty-handed only a few years ago gets to stand in front of patriots and in front of a major political party ... It is my small share to show the world, by standing there, the goodness of America." | "" "" ""

There is no doubt that Bob Hugin is the better Bob in this race.
[ **It's time to Send in a Marine** ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=ed1c2637479941b0852fdd6705670c7c&_e=_2WVCG3ZbcR-EBM_ntS7yKN-ur_fejCUZzm4C3SCLMHxZF41vbo5C0WUH5r9qc4sQr_p_pcjgKTJCv0hykl7YwzoYqYhsrDHHFjT3TX-5JC7q1KvgswHVjJJ2dDF62TvQUbGs05HTE3EkSssT7hlvOuMoGP7_Sfqc_zjwanu6g9LHV9DqgU66W_tJNAJ_I1-HxGhg7u6DPeceVCxcAgE9CcjhVSltFIDCWlU-5by_taT3NnajYmYPMEPyq-nNskfhjSK6DQg1u93Je3f75UfIclLpVbbA-NiQw12Kg5nf3izs_G9oC-YATA-psYbDN3eHJtrjyl4D7bi-TOTVHJonXKAtDCHxz788JjqgGGsxtkSJLrw-d7R3ylpczkAXWBDWFzJVuzeFF8NAwPiVatPexbENZjxNSYP0mf8udp8zB0N40e81rBDOQQZSgdDnBVk)
Outlets like CNN, RealClearPolitics, and Cook Political Report are all changing their predictions of the race to show Bob Hugin has a real shot at winning in November, but we need your help. If we get the vote out on November 6th, Bob Hugin will be New Jersey's next United States Senator.
With Election Day only a few weeks away, we also wanted to let you know about our Get-Out-the-Vote (GOTV) campaign efforts. Starting on Thursday November 1st, we will be compensating volunteers for their canvassing efforts until polls close on Tuesday, November 6th. Additionally, our campaign will be compensating Election Day Challengers on November 6th.
GOTV canvassing shifts are available all day, from 9:00am - 9:00pm. For the first 9 hours of the day (9:00am - 6:00pm) volunteers will be going door-to-door, and from 6:00pm - 9:00pm volunteers will be making phone calls from our campaign offices. Each 3-hour shift will be paid at a rate of $45. name: Dana Bye
subject: Rep. Brat is trying to re-write his record on health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Abigail decided to run for Congress after Rep. Dave Brat voted to undermine critical protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Now he is trying to deny he ever did it.
| | Peter, Here on the ground in VA-7, every day we hear that voters are deeply concerned about health care. Like Abigail, who decided to run for Congress after Rep. Dave Brat voted to undermine critical protections for people with pre-existing conditions, voters in our district believe our government should work to improve our health care system -- _not ruin it._ Rep. Brat apparently realizes this, too -- **because now that he is facing a tough challenge from Abigail, he is attempting to re-write his record on this issue.** As confirmed by independent fact-checkers, the health care repeal bill Rep. Brat supported last year would have allowed insurance companies to discriminate against people with pre-existing conditions by charging them more. **But he is now trying to distract voters from the truth by denying this simple and easily verifiable fact.** Peter, Central Virginians deserve a representative who will defend our access to health care -- not vote to undermine it and lie about it later. [**Will you make a donation today so we can repeal Rep. Brat and replace him with Abigail, an honest, accountable leader who will stand up for our care?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/25UDsTy0ajpSX_Z0oZnAFRbtTu2VsKwP9V1UhqMnJ-A=/KII2P0BVPTnjD--H7a0kmW8WxLNzrhd-TZpW0SolnUQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Now, we aren't at all surprised that Rep. Brat is being defensive about his record, Peter. After all, it is out of step with our district. But it is up to us to keep the record straight about the issues at stake in this race, [**so any support you can lend us in the final weeks is much appreciated.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/25UDsTy0ajpSX_Z0oZnAFRbtTu2VsKwP9V1UhqMnJ-A=/KII2P0BVPTnjD--H7a0kmW8WxLNzrhd-TZpW0SolnUQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/25UDsTy0ajpSX_Z0oZnAFRbtTu2VsKwP9V1UhqMnJ-A=/KII2P0BVPTnjD--H7a0kmW8WxLNzrhd-TZpW0SolnUQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/25UDsTy0ajpSX_Z0oZnAFRbtTu2VsKwP9V1UhqMnJ-A=/KII2P0BVPTnjD--H7a0kmW8WxLNzrhd-TZpW0SolnUQ=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/25UDsTy0ajpSX_Z0oZnAFRbtTu2VsKwP9V1UhqMnJ-A=/8Hh3nVWpw-ux2h8UZ-_iLDy2O3fsuQsa2s8jM8U1fRQ=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: John Shimkus
subject: Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
When President Trump chose Brett Kavanaugh as his nominee to the Supreme Court, he did so because of Kavanaugh’s strong values, unquestionable charact
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=9eb35823c3f348babcaa959d02f7bc83&_e=SOFTvAZ72CFzsm-vHpsBTqOL967c73sJVlqTxsnt2qfEoegQNuQc1D6BXirU_1YJ_PVU03D2FgxyEvF5eG8xYCkOg0Sq-zaRju4grf_svusEvkzWVBzO7qDODNU6n9MrAZejDnY1RwBK8pmzdVBLzt1MNGWiGEGDMtWS-T1_Xq8ovf8je8d-lG6whjAa3bPSpK0qV7Xjx3oX-kVd-5WY3yvV0qhSwkEPhcYYtMBW-AbZ88AGH4IV8nEjDd8LXnPRSOKvEHBMq1DaRGSZZy25K21AplSJ_blTE9utvdvGhiOaNnIRpOgZptY3LpwL5x559vEq23gU3M7mQTSG2265g92gFBlkQADRPh9w6xna5W38ZeSi-osnMnCXK2CmjOv0xC_d3RL2dsiLqc8Wwn4f8Q%3D%3D)
Friend,

When President Trump chose Brett Kavanaugh as his nominee to the Supreme Court, he did so because of Kavanaugh’s strong values, unquestionable character, and extensive record of fighting for our Constitution.

...But the left tried to erase that.

First, they poured over thousands of pages of documents from his long career, attempting to find something – anything – wrong with his legal past. They found absolutely nothing.

Then, rather than accept the fact that the President’s nominee was qualified, they took it a step further and sunk to new lows: assaulting his character, promoting unsubstantiated allegations, and publicly and permanently humiliating him and his family as the whole world looked on. Still, their shameful efforts were not enough to prevent the truth from shining through.

He was not afforded the presumption of innocence, but the presumption of guilt. He was not given a fair chance at clearing his name, unfairly and unjustly shamed by the court of public opinion. He was met by some in Washington with hellbent opposition before even holding a single meeting.

Not only is the treatment shown to now-Justice Kavanaugh wrong, but it is against the core of our American values. The left should be ashamed of their conduct.

In the end, Justice Kavanaugh sent a clear message to his opponents: strong character will always prevail over lies, deceit, and injustice. [**I hope you will join me in congratulating him for not giving up the fight and standing firm for the truth.**](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=9eb35823c3f348babcaa959d02f7bc83&_e=SOFTvAZ72CFzsm-vHpsBTj04ZDeVYIo9krJmuj5iqiBjP6WzaZxxJmgAYKO0w6r2gzdWJhyJqRvRRXY9t0mYG0kQQd_orRafWiN6NOOjoo5TuDgj4kGh7sgZQT72kw3rcAz89hpfNjuV6i4wwZJ80DqIz1cT9ePZylDC5T7TbLjeLCVeUHl1ENEIXWQYf6OpnZRT3F9DAT0OVA0rCB4SHYHhahN3xTi0wr6M121WMOWqcCV0kZLpY5oOQCYfU6Vu3ytw1Ow8emDIPmou5lLU9KWabHdzgX9HSFV81dHo7ut3-0w2dWATIdKpdlP1_e-NLEDxJJbV_DtVyj8pdDqDyU2IZd93fJlUvWQ73ihfGuNiUSNRKDsq5QHirmE8pHuZPQiBaIClK1yUczZ_1ZNOQ9R9f6_f5vgt3peQoXMPViTOtorIvd0URp-IsLS-XgoM)

[Sign the Card: Congratulations, Justice Kavanaugh](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=9eb35823c3f348babcaa959d02f7bc83&_e=SOFTvAZ72CFzsm-vHpsBTj04ZDeVYIo9krJmuj5iqiBjP6WzaZxxJmgAYKO0w6r2gzdWJhyJqRvRRXY9t0mYG0kQQd_orRafWiN6NOOjoo5TuDgj4kGh7sgZQT72kw3rcAz89hpfNjuV6i4wwZJ80DqIz1cT9ePZylDC5T7TbLjeLCVeUHl1ENEIXWQYf6OpnZRT3F9DAT0OVA0rCB4SHYHhahN3xTi0wr6M121WMOW4ik0aFXtD0ZUtwyyJ71ejPcYO2_1OQCqUg7-i11_ia4P_YBRpNEI5zozJTxS-CwyJtetbgangccOm3L_3O2160hGSGxBHURTvdXNPzQVfoN0ICKQOy-UI_UAO8ZRZE11pQzuoZSHIMxhFus3i4DuI460Fwkp73C52CMy7kGTzpO_2bWUBsAx3reZlAKKbkhrHdUvKOKZGnxEUaef2CrRN)
---

In spite of all odds, the United States of America now has a new Justice on the Supreme Court. Justice Kavanaugh will serve our country with honor, defend our nation’s most sacred principles, protect life, and adjudicate fairly for all.

He and his family went through Hell and back. They were shown the worst America has to offer.

But in a true testament to Justice Kavanaugh’s character, he will now go to work ensuring that all Americans – even his harshest critics – are never denied the rights and privileges guaranteed by our Constitution.

Congratulations, Justice Kavanaugh.

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnshimkus.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_s=9eb35823c3f348babcaa959d02f7bc83&_t=4ovR10bsSLW4yxJeTd-m1Cg2sJZ1ISVvG5crQXIlA1SUO9HCOkgrEpLNb9NO8lUqsaGBotx0PXIz5kxEkX6nMz3ySUc5EoZvL6x-cQeXhXtUaZHgmOR7g4z4ksgwhmHzG6fvH29__o89eRkHrX2Qh8rvWQgOSy0ckySfcOL0OzE%3D)

name: Invite@StantonforArizona.com
subject: Join Rep. Joe Kennedy III on Tuesday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

On Tuesday, October 16th from 12:00 to 1:30 we are hosting a special lunch, featuring special guest Rep. Joe Kennedy III, in support of the Saguaro Victory fund and we hope you can join us.

Contributions to the Saguaro Victory fund will benefit three key races in Arizona this year: Ann Kirkpatrick running in CD-2, Tom O'Halleran running in CD-1, and Greg's campaign.

**Address will be provided upon RSVP.** [**To contribute to the Saguaro Victory Fund, and RSVP automatically, please visit this link.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7F7uEGprC00dTujlgM_naZL4IpsmJ6eLOAShGXEIh9g=/wZARCASuFZKoEY3W7-wzcq5JsRUB0lmuo1xm9xRgvEY= "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedylunch?refcode=181016KennedyLunch_RSVPYES&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=lindsay@tomohalleran.com&firstname=Lindsay&lastname=Coleman&city=Flagstaff&state=AZ&zip=86001&phone=9286001537&occupation=Attorney&employer=Penmark Industries")

Additionally, our host committee is still in formation. If you're interested in joining, please [**contact our organizer Charlie Burgin by clicking here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7F7uEGprC00dTujlgM_naZL4IpsmJ6eLOAShGXEIh9g=/EzIs97NRpJYlhQ_JkCJhKXmqpp7Y7bDaiX5KmgP_buk=?subject=October%2016th%20Host%20Cmte)!

Thanks again for your support, we're forward to seeing you there!

_\- Team Stanton_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7F7uEGprC00dTujlgM_naZL4IpsmJ6eLOAShGXEIh9g=/fxyzHp6wcUdVkdC7x5CpwCNy_8MYZZDM22f33PrsFKk= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedylunch?refcode=181016KennedyLunch_RSVPYES&recurring=auto&amount=200&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=lindsay@tomohalleran.com&firstname=Lindsay&lastname=Coleman&city=Flagstaff&state=AZ&zip=86001&phone=9286001537&occupation=Attorney&employer=Penmark Industries")

**Can 't make it? Please help make the event a success by clicking below:**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/7F7uEGprC00dTujlgM_naZL4IpsmJ6eLOAShGXEIh9g=/kJdeqS83MExoBl90AXrux-8f_AwD6mfcdlfPTrzFJX4=?refcode=181016KennedyLunch_RSVPNO&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=lindsay@tomohalleran.com&firstname=Lindsay&lastname=Coleman&city=Flagstaff&state=AZ&zip=86001&phone=9286001537&occupation=Attorney&employer=Penmark%20Industries)

Friend,

Election day is 27 days away.

That’s not much time at all. It’s never been more crucial to act than it is right now.

That’s why I’m sending this back to the top of your inbox, to make sure you take advantage of this DOUBLE MATCH opportunity.

**ELECTION COUNTDOWN**

Days Until the Election: 27 Days

Double Match Status: **ACTIVATED**

| [MATCH MY DONATION](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleHhpwr2FrtaUxHcR_nyC64hgqX6VEXA4uGnctT5wbOrdaNMmO7EvfuEZUIEqKfZjZ_jBe2XELwwKqOATSySr9raIeXlGZFrWdVEHu9sX5OE5y5EyR8amlxHyG0lVlIA8OId8R8fz_P83r5AsMxpZDCsBeYWvmI2fzWutfWxOFccTxfD5xQCwK4ZWR9VBohx5PcZRnJXG7rM3kgTjH4mw9MpjrSmuXkDT15lktl32ckbXMbA-Zhjt2ym9rxbJdpuiC3N1VNV6OVO1h_7Zy6Mb1fM1mJlzWwH8yHCyyY1DnzTG3LQdVWlx6LfkMrvGe4HuL2D8rsKsXg0291mOQu12Kr8vE2K9dHRhbcilY38HZ5akS2POMcJ1uKZakRRUCufQ4DOCxaR5Mn-9MbETEwo4KA0%3D)

Every single day, Tammy Baldwin knocks on more doors, makes more calls, and pumps more money into her TV ad budget. We need to keep pace if we’re going to be competitive on Election Day.

We can’t fall behind. I need you to chip in NOW: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleHhpwr2FrtaUxHcR_nyC64hgqX6VEXA4uGnctT5wbOrdaNMmO7EvfuEZUIEqKfZjZ_jBe2XELwwKqOATSySr9raIeXlGZFrWdVEHu9sX5OE5y5EyR8amlxHyG0lVlIA8OId8R8fz_P83r5AsMxpZDCsBeYWvmI2fzWutfWxOFccTtOyYlKYjOi06MpLoJ5nS4KjP2h_VX1XE3dc4zlScQySiFqZ5gfvcBd1lLLE5TefK9j5-etFzmlnAucJG63M4utPCYS0L6X7CIVzUX7hxMaZeba-vMMAnex4P6nasI0LfjeNjSbxuvIpVhEMH5t55kEeLSinXfxoTW1Xk3Z0bCwiQYccn7CQitYSRgFhhTXMOoqd3rz9mNZ2pRndt4rgwL3DSCHQIOKrpoR9o1RuifAM%3D)**

This big double match opportunity may be our last chance to really close the gap between us and Tammy.

[**Will you help me win this fight, or will you sit on the sidelines?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleHhpwr2FrtaUxHcR_nyC64hgqX6VEXA4uGnctT5wbOrdaNMmO7EvfuEZUIEqKfZjZ_jBe2XELwwKqOATSySr9raIeXlGZFrWdVEHu9sX5OE5y5EyR8amlxHyG0lVlIA8OId8R8fz_P83r5AsMxpZDCsBeYWvmI2fzWutfWxOFccT8KN-C7qSI-kL7pT4rqoJTq34MZiAFJKYdMnyoDim-3WYzQT-hVahXbOPYOa2umgwNG41a8SU8Fooq40xbzogVzrw8Jd7ZPO1bxT1q-pStZ1dU5zivX6P0qISbVIgLSvCMwXlXR1fcW7FzJZ-iZyr0mCo_AmU0YSprjcetH1DC2dU8hmWkyta2ZOfzNGs4FAc9CfAzvl7zzQmfJXnXm8Jr0hnz6oNcvnp0BTr1nbvpIs%3D)

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend,

I'm watching everything with you right now.

I know what the media is saying. They are counting us out. They don’t think we can win in Wisconsin.

But friend, that couldn't be further from the truth.

I’m no stranger to tough campaigns. Heck, I’ve spent my whole life as the underdog.

I know Tammy Baldwin and the liberal elites are outspending us. But I also know, if we work together, we WILL prevail.

And Friend, an amazing supporter of ours is working with us to make sure we have everything it takes to defeat Tammy in these final weeks. They've agreed to DOUBLE MATCH every donation we receive between now and midnight tomorrow.

Will you take advantage of this opportunity and chip in now? [**Everything will count for DOUBLE what you donate.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleHhpwr2FrtaUxHcR_nyC64hgqX6VEXA4uGnctT5wbOrdaNMmO7EvfuEZUIEqKfZjZ_jBe2XELwwKqOATSySr9raIeXlGZFrWdVEHu9sX5OE5y5EyR8amlxHyG0lVlIA8OId8R8fz_P83r5AsMxpZDCsBeYWvmI2fzWutfWxOFccTjZEJgiASevXKlvHiMe-Z-Osf53T0gqVXkRgEo9YybCGcOipVwuXSsstxNZxYvw3JS6bekpofxA0VRfpFN-nBYV-HgNA-60_M-j6Au5UV3lFasMcxzkyvESMCMD62HPELTKpYEBTcqj-o6dWNnIYDpLpcPLI1wcnyB3rARR1_Ep5S16klIhUl38kiEb7SWJo3CWegoF-SD7av8CTutGL6TMwe67jAD7KCLrR2WIFQBgQ%3D)

Friend, I know the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump.

But politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She won't support our Supreme Court nominees. She won’t vote to build the wall. She stands in the way of repealing Obamacare. And friend, she didn’t even vote for the middle class tax cuts!

That’s unacceptable.

I know that if I get to Washington, I will make things happen by standing with the America First agenda we all believe in.

And right now we have an amazing chance to improve our standing before election day. Every dollar you chip in will help us get out the vote, put ads on TV, digital, and radio, and get our message out.

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleLFSU5Wr5N2B__yZiKu5huH27YIK66h0a8zr9gu3ad5hjR6fpt4vmf1RVFzurVO_cfdFHoQtfv8sduL6L8keOV6OchIi-mIKr_85WI-V2XuuPAXF9XqRJveiinuLPIsE25si_6et6-wpW5BcEGXgiFs6RVJFv2Opvvf-7n7buWgL3bICfeWPBTm5a5I5PnCUYSGmHCcRnkckIma39oVtlxtdOEy7dVXYX9Hi4N21DvqMCDgy81jPTCMv9Xl699G862NhpiZhNpZMyKB0KUeaWiyLshzUeh_ldJ0QB7sdfy5hh2f31pnamvx-XByFmJ-48XNrEXURjCiHw7lhV4-vv-viAv4N6e_vpGhuWFsvFA3v) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleLFSU5Wr5N2B__yZiKu5huH8tfpTnbD1y3DlQB6BYNDz23G01osDExJ60pcJ-znstwJWatXYYPekp0YoaMMenopheZwPUF7j8lFN23lmUp6wattatyl43dFXAVBOlEHCplvwFbuUXQgPCsGGBeTAz2OKQ2qbgeqmo5DBT-ILsgNxXKPwUwBDpUHQOEcVCMWxDRRnXlobmedfNnxKn5apR0DvCBtyfgVhgVUIUAbcUyHiNcyg5EbJ5DijDmaFLwDPsM-78HR6qKExi8iP5s5PZxU4jSnNY3mtCIDlp8rqxj-rv6eiQnkdITzQCIkdDMLpinL6QU_zyFNjakNK_O2SgiIOgWJfb4tmVIVC6EB0y5_7) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleECHq632o5kmQaCfeCZ_or8UYXb-v11J89RoZgO5p3JxGr5ScZUMlONkKZCdujesmbDAgOdVMQJd-uCXLuPGMcK0tHjNs1QEmrfm3hkUcFDzjfSb8-iXhHKg9Lhs4sIXIscNbykAklQN4ZrYAPMpV5OMFrChm9crcIEnpBrtbybAnPuR5lZxFRtKbFcj4mNNdpBwAho_kvJqlPGqaiulz9FiVUj7lxQWrfMT6nMi9PcC9o7iDFQtkZ_aRuLe00abjg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleMQQj2zc6u_QSvV4P8RU8-weFqD1j2Hr_QSC55oHyD6TtfD2E0zzTaYZQ8JQdHFLzXJKuBk38Q4Rivk8GPe3G_NrLUoFSYQhI6-IOHk2pcYGd7dOQR2yTeCdEUT21LE4_7YIchFXopMdsggwFvPXAkcFaav99x23vsoiNHR_RWwbUCQPBs6maCWEgjJeF8UbvhuumMijnZzsTEapo8CTsfqNaHwFxq4ef3mtiOsYYRAGlVoj6Z0eeIXHS7M4HPFAxQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4ed4663bc1d048c288be3cd2a4c60a39&_e=JEqsAkcSAb9DHvVY15VleK0gB73zlI2cRvQkuqFod9NqYKnJ4ken-BJOh2qhEVx8EPcxTtf6letyhu4pGRli7QXiM7M5OureneX0EsDeZ4rhjg-fSDta9gR7oOOnh7EVoIKNXTbUDGFqnqCBQbzsnvm9t1ZLbXM2mZHP5jA5xBcFHkrI-fBPkXaMXByEgTcoDAT76klz_h6DGFPoVyfSP9LXIWDQG6j8keA_TVJKsRuR-PlQrtFj_ZLtA1vG9TKdZSVk3NcjIUFauA82oP_z-g%3D%3D) feed. ELECTION COUNTDOWN Days Until the Election: 27 Days Double Match Status: ACTIVATED | Every single day, Tammy Baldwin knocks on more doors, makes more calls, and pumps more money into her TV ad budget. We need to keep pace if we’re going to be competitive on Election Day. We can’t fall behind. I need you to chip in NOW: This big double match opportunity may be our last chance to really close the gap between us and Tammy. \- Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, I'm watching everything with you right now. I know what the media is saying. They are counting us out. They don’t think we can win in Wisconsin. But friend, that couldn't be further from the truth. I’m no stranger to tough campaigns. Heck, I’ve spent my whole life as the underdog. I know Tammy Baldwin and the liberal elites are outspending us. But I also know, if we work together, we WILL prevail. And Friend, an amazing supporter of ours is working with us to make sure we have everything it takes to defeat Tammy in these final weeks. They've agreed to DOUBLE MATCH every donation we receive between now and midnight tomorrow. Will you take advantage of this opportunity and chip in now? Friend, I know the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump. But politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She won't support our Supreme Court nominees. She won’t vote to build the wall. She stands in the way of repealing Obamacare. And friend, she didn’t even vote for the middle class tax cuts! That’s unacceptable. I know that if I get to Washington, I will make things happen by standing with the America First agenda we all believe in. And right now we have an amazing chance to improve our standing before election day. Every dollar you chip in will help us get out the vote, put ads on TV, digital, and radio, and get our message out. Please, chip in to have your donation DOUBLE MATCHED today. Let’s win this thing. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Walter Mondale
subject: Thank You, Senator Klobuchar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Like many of you, I was glued to the television last week, watching a scene unfold in Washington that struck me to my core. Our whole country heard the testimony of a brave citizen guided by civic duty, saw the blind partisanship of politics in Washington, and felt the immense pressure of this moment in our nation's history.

We also saw my former college intern -- and later law firm colleague and friend -- Senator Amy Klobuchar, buck the grandstanding and make a difference through not only the clarity and power of her arguments, but also the strength of her convictions.

"Where is the bravery in this room?" she asked.

When I served in the Senate we faced big tests too. During Watergate I saw firsthand the damage a leader can do to our democracy when he puts his party and ambitions before the people.

But Amy took a different tack.

It will take a lot of work from leaders like Amy, and citizens like you and me, to bring our nation back to a sense of decency and dignity. While this nomination process did not end with the result that many of us hoped, it made clear just how high the stakes truly are.

This is not a time to back down. **We need Amy 's voice in the Senate now more than ever.**

As Amy so eloquently said in her remarks to the Judiciary Committee, "The Constitution does not say, 'We the ruling party.' The Constitution says, 'We the people.'" Throughout this process, as she always has in the Senate, Amy spoke up firmly and resoundingly for the people.

I know I'm glad she's our Senator at this critical time.

**Let 's make sure she gets re-elected in November so she can keep fighting for us.** Please join me in supporting her re-election by making a contribution today.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Cory Booker
subject: Ben Jealous is a true leader
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
I'm proud to join Ben again today.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378995/7ab0e2c4/7e06d240/34981069/144932538/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker?refcode=OHQ10108A") Friend, Elections are won on the streets -- and my friend Ben is working hard to prove that every day. Since he announced his run for governor of Maryland almost 500 days ago, Ben has hit the pavement every single day to talk to folks about the issues that matter to them. Door by door, block by block, he listened and he promised to do more to help. That's what being a leader is truly all about. **That's why I'm proud to join him again in Maryland today ahead of the final stretch before Election Day. I know he's the right choice for Maryland, and I know you agree -- that's why I'm hoping you'll join me in showing your support.** [**Donate $5 or more right now if you're ready to see Ben Jealous as Maryland's next governor.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378995/7ab0e2c4/7e06d240/34981069/144932538/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker?refcode=OHQ10108A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378995/7ab0e2c4/7e06d240/34981068/144932538/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker?refcode=OHQ10108A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

I know Ben's running in Maryland -- but this race truly has a national impact.
Ben's running on principles we all care about: better, more affordable health care, fully-funded public schools, and an end to mass incarceration.
Corporate interests have been laser focused on taking Ben down since the primary, but Ben's not one to back down, and neither am I. That's why we're here fighting the good fight in Maryland, and it's why I know Ben can win this.
But he needs your help -- this campaign is funded by grassroots donations like yours, so I'm hoping you'll step up today. [**Donate $5 or more to support my friend Ben Jealous right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378995/7ab0e2c4/7e06d240/34981069/144932538/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker?refcode=OHQ10108A")
Thanks,
Cory

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Why Claire's fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I had to update you on this, Friends: POLITICO said my friend Claire McCaskill's race in Missouri is **"the key battleground for control of the Senate this fall,"** but a recent poll shows Claire trailing her extremist opponent.

That means Claire needs the immediate support of this powerful grassroots team. I know we can help her team raise another $10,000 by midnight tonight, but we're running out of time to hit this goal.

**I'm counting on you to step up with an immediate donation now to help Claire in this must-win race - ****[will you give $5 right now to help Claire protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat and take back the Senate in November](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4cmc?refcode=jtk891-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)?**

name: Jared Page
subject: Fresh Polling: TIE BALL GAME!
body:
Friends,

I wanted to make sure that all of you saw the new polling that was released this afternoon. This race is continuing to swing in our favor, which is documented in the latest poll attached below. TIE BALL GAME!

-Jared

Article: <https://www.rollcall.com/news/politics/gop-poll-morrisey-manchin-almost-tied/>
# GOP Poll Puts Morrisey and Manchin Almost Even After Kavanaugh Vote
By Simone Pathe
A new Republican poll of the West Virginia Senate race shows a tighter race between Democratic Sen. [Joe Manchin](https://www.rollcall.com/members?2120&utm_source=memberLink?utm_source=memberLink "Click to view member info in a new window") III and Attorney General Patrick Morrisey.____
Manchin led Morrisey 41 to 40 percent in the survey conducted for the National Republican Senatorial Committee and Morrisey’s campaign and obtained first by Roll Call.____
Public Opinion Strategies surveyed 600 likely voters from Oct. 7-9, with 40 percent of interviews over cell phone. The poll has a margin of error of plus or minus 4 percentage points.____
The poll went into the field the day after the Senate voted to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Manchin was the only Democrat to vote for Kavanaugh on Saturday.____
As soon as[ Manchin announced his support for Kavanaugh](https://www.rollcall.com/news/politics/joe-manchin-yes-kavanaugh-nomination-might-democrat) on Friday, which he did only after Maine GOP Sen. [Susan Collins](https://www.rollcall.com/members?239&utm_source=memberLink?utm_source=memberLink "Click to view member info in a new window") came out for him, Morrisey accused the Democratic Senator of making a “craven political calculation.” ____
Manchin has faced some criticism from Democrats at home in the days since his vote. But running in a state President Donald Trump carried by 42 points in 2016, Manchin has to win over Trump voters. He told the[ Associated Press](https://apnews.com/05ffe223bf024740950e8fbf235362fd) in an interview in Charleston on Sunday that his vote wasn’t a political decision. ____
Manchin has led in recent public and private polling of the race. In a Tarrance Group survey conducted for the Senate Leadership Fund Sept. 23-25, Manchin led Morrisey 47 to 43 percent. Manchin’s own polling of the race, conducted Sept. 19-23, gave him a 12-point lead.

The White House • October 10, 2018
## Hurricane Michael makes landfall
##
**As Hurricane Michael** moves across Northwest Florida and affects Americans in Georgia and Alabama, the Trump Administration wants every person in the storm’s path to take shelter, stay safe, and heed all warnings from local and state officials. **Yesterday, President Trump declared** a state of emergency for Florida, authorizing the Department of Homeland Security and FEMA to coordinate all disaster relief efforts and provide appropriate assistance for required emergency measures. Specifically, FEMA is authorized at its discretion to identify, mobilize, and provide all equipment and resources necessary to alleviate suffering from the storm. **“Federal resources** are on the ground at every level,” President Trump said today. **Earlier this afternoon** , the President joined Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen and FEMA Administrator Brock Long in the Oval Office for a briefing on the storm’s expected impact. When Hurricane Michael made landfall today, it registered as a powerful category 4 storm, on the verge of historic category 5 strength. **[Get up-to-date information on the federal response to Hurricane Michael](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDY2MTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjA2NjE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4NjYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.fema.gov/hurricane-michael). ** **Watch:** [**President Trump’s statement from this afternoon**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDY2MTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjA2NjE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4NjYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1050103488284364802)
## President Trump signs legislation to help patients save on prescription drugs
##
**Today, President Trump delivered** on common-sense reform to prescription drug pricing, making good on a core promise from his 2016 campaign. **“Gag clauses” have long prevented pharmacists** from telling patients when they could save money on medications by paying out of pocket instead of relying on their insurance. By signing the Know the Lowest Price Act and the Patient Right to Know Drug Prices Act this afternoon, President Trump is putting an end to these gag clauses for patients on either Medicare or private plans. **Lowering drug prices** has been a priority of the Trump Administration since day one. For example, the Food and Drug Administration approved the most generic drug applications _ever_ last year—saving patients an estimated $8.8 billion in 2017 alone. **In stark contrast** to the President’s patient-centered approach, Democrats are going even further than Obamacare, pushing yet another radical agenda on healthcare. “Medicare for All” is the slogan, but as usual, the fine print reveals how these proposals will take away benefits seniors have paid into their whole lives:
* “Medicare for All” comes with a****_$32 trillion dollar price-tag_. Even doubling taxes wouldn’t be enough to pay for this astonishing cost.
* Supporters of “Medicare for All” would have no choice but to cut benefits, raise economy-crippling taxes—or both—to cover the massive cost.
* Many seniors would lose access to their favorite doctors and face long lines for appointments and procedures.
* Medicare Advantage plans would be eliminated, leaving millions of vulnerable seniors with nowhere to go.

[**Get the facts on how President Trump puts American patients first**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDY2MTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjA2NjE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4NjYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-ensuring-patients-receive-information-need-save-money-prescription-drugs/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch** : [**Today’s signing ceremony at the White House**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEwLjk2MDY2MTYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMC45NjA2NjE2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk4NjYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lZIDAzb8tW0)

As thousands of Valley voters begin to lock in their votes, I’m reminded of what an honor it is to be a part of our nation’s great electoral process.

But as voters start to cast their ballots, time is running out. The election is only 29 days away, and voters are making their decisions NOW.

I need to make sure that my message is reaching voters before they cast their ballots. That means picking up the pace. We need to make sure our ads are reaching every voter on TV, radio, and digital. I hope you’ll join me today to defend our home.

-Jeff

It’s hard to believe that we’re already here. In just 7 days, Valley voters will begin casting their ballots in this year’s general election.

clean_body: We’re already a few days into our emergency fundraising push, but we still have another $18,342 to go. Friend, We’re already a few days into our emergency fundraising push, but we still have another $18,342 to go. Thank you again, friend. I appreciate everything you’re doing to help us with this fight for the Valley. -Jeff \---Forwarded Message Below--- Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw my email earlier last week about voting early. The day has arrived! Absentee ballots are being mailed and voting has begun across the 10th District. As thousands of Valley voters begin to lock in their votes, I’m reminded of what an honor it is to be a part of our nation’s great electoral process. But as voters start to cast their ballots, time is running out. The election is only 29 days away, and voters are making their decisions NOW. I need to make sure that my message is reaching voters before they cast their ballots. That means picking up the pace. We need to make sure our ads are reaching every voter on TV, radio, and digital. We need to make sure our volunteers have the resources they need to knock on every door they can, and we don’t have any time to waste. But friend, according to my finance team, to do all that we need to raise another $38,147 by the end of this week. I’ve asked them to set up an emergency fund to raise the money at the link below. I don’t make this request lightly, but if we don’t act now we leave the Valley vulnerable to the Bay Area liberals’ “blue wave” - and I won’t let that happen. I hope you’ll join me today to defend our home. -Jeff \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, In one week, voting will begin throughout California ahead of this year’s general election. It’s hard to believe that we’re already here. In just 7 days, Valley voters will begin casting their ballots in this year’s general election. Once again, we have the chance to prove that Valley values are stronger than the liberal elitists from the Bay Area. But, friend, my opponent has the help of Nancy Pelosi and her Bay Area liberal donors. They’re throwing everything they’ve got into making the Valley a part of their so-called “Blue Wave.” We can’t let that happen. We have 7 days before voters start locking in their votes, which means we have to act NOW. We have to spread our message before they fill out their ballots. I can’t thank you enough, Friend. Jeff Paid for by Denham for Congress

| | | Big news - **In-person early voting starts this Monday in Georgia!** We have an aggressive strategy to get as many Georgians as possible to the polls over the next 27 days - but to keep our efforts going strong, we need all of our supporters to chip in: Make a $3 donation today to help our team get millions of Georgians to the polls before Election Day. **[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa898/34a064cc/ffa51c6/70dce81/1902806757/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEwMTgtYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101018-b")** Our recent campaign finance report _proves_ that our grassroots strategy is working -- over 38,000 Georgians have chipped in to support our people-powered campaign! But we're in for a tough fight come Election Day, and it will only get tougher unless we show up now. So before in-person early voting starts THIS MONDAY, we need to reach out to every Georgian with information about where and when they can vote early. Every single vote now brings us one step closer to victory. **[Chip in to fund our critical voter outreach efforts before the polls open for early voting on Monday. Our campaign depends on small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you, so we really need you to step up now.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa898/34a064cc/ffa51c6/70dce81/1902806757/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEwMTgtYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101018-b")** We've spent months telling people we have a candidate worth voting for. name: Team Kaine
subject: Their opponents are backed by the NRA. To fight back, support these 8 Democrats:
disclaimer_text: paid for by the gun lobby
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1013/3e0906/760a85ed/3e37b6cc/3059872583/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8&source=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8")

| | Derek:

This month marks one year since the tragic mass shooting in Las Vegas that killed 58 people and injured more than 800. Mass shootings in this country happen far too often and are far too deadly - and the majority of Americans support common-sense gun safety reforms to stop them from occurring. But Congress hasn't acted.

_Why? Because too many Republicans in Washington are bought and paid for by the gun lobby._

But we can change that. Today, Team Kaine is joining gun violence prevention advocates and organizations, Tim's colleagues in the House and Senate, and folks around the country to take a stand against the NRA's dangerous tactic of buying up politicians.

[In the next 24 hours, we'll help raise $1 million to support eight Congressional seats where the NRA has invested their big dollars. Will you help?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1013/3e0906/760a85ed/3e37b6c3/3059872583/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nr8?refcode=tkaine?refcode=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+In+the+next+24+hours+well+help+raise+1+m&utm_campaign=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8&source=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8")

One of those candidates is right here in Virginia - VA 10's Jennifer Wexton - and we're proud to support her, along with the seven other strong Democrats who will fight for safer neighborhoods, schools, and workplaces.

**Your contribution today won't go to Tim Kaine. It will be split directly between these eight candidates that the gun lobby has invested against:**
* VA 10 - Jennifer Wexton
* TX 32 - Colin Allred
* NV Sen - Jacky Rosen
* CO 6 - Jason Crow
* PA 7 - Susan Wild
* TX 7 - Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
* CA 10 - Josh Harder
* CA 49 - Mike Levin

| [**CLICK HERE TO JOIN US**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1013/3e0906/760a85ed/3e37b6c2/3059872583/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nr8?refcode=tkaine?refcode=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+CLICK+HERE+TO+JOIN+US&utm_campaign=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8&source=20181010_2_FR_TEAM_NR8")
---
We know that when we ask you to dig deep and chip in, it's usually to support our own efforts - but this is important to Tim and to the entire team. We believe that together, we can take a stand against the NRA's big money, and we can make real change in this country.

Thank you for your support.

_-Team Kaine_

subject: True colors
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|

Friend,

I want to follow up about last night's debate. **Jeff showed us his true colors: he is Minnesota mean, not Minnesota nice.**

Between his schoolyard bullying on Twitter and his disparaging comments about Somali-Minnesotans who fled violence and instability in their homeland for a better life, Johnson showed us who he really is.

**[It may be who Johnson is, but it's not who we are. Can you join me today in saying Minnesota is a place where everyone deserves respect?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MLrYUF6RpVz9kaEvyzTSQv2le-Ds1CJ4KFtTIhMYSXQ=/7fovJj3mkua7c9iIXnaPF1FeUmDG9YRGDJiySkunRtE=?refcode=20181010.2nd&amount=10)**

What we saw last night was a clear contrast between two visions for this state. Jeff Johnson is offering a vision for Minnesota that is rooted in divisive language.

There are 27 days until the election and we can feel the race tightening. We can't afford to let up now. **I just ran the numbers, and we need to raise $7,500 by the end of the week to effectively counter Jeff 's message on social media.** Will you pitch in right now?

body:
Don't miss your chance to see Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Joe Donnelly in Hammond on Friday! |
---
| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2df0/7377f838/39670234/51f89d86/695771616/VEsH/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")
---
Hi Peter,

Don't miss your chance to see Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Joe Donnelly in Hammond on Friday! Tickets are going fast, but we still have some left. **[Will you join us?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2df0/7377f838/39670234/51f89d86/695771616/VEsE/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")**
Friday, October 12
Hammond Civic Center
5825 Sohl Ave., Hammond, IN 46320

Doors open at 4:00 pm (CT)
Rally begins at 5:00 pm (CT)

**Event is FREE, but you must register in advance.**

**********[**GET TICKETS**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2df0/7377f838/39670234/51f89d86/695771616/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")**********
---

**__Please read the following important information.__**

Only four tickets per registration. **Tickets are required for entry.**

You cannot receive your ticket by email.**

_Media must respond to press@joeforindiana.com by 12 p.m. on Thursday, October 11, to be credentialed to cover this event. Riser space will be available on a first-come, first-served basis._

name: Bob Casey
subject: almost time
