body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d16/51dbcc2a/11a746cc/3aaf2c6/2663914501/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team --

In just a few hours, President Trump will hold another rally here in Pennsylvania, and I have no doubt that he will attack me for voting against the most dangerous parts of his agenda.

I will never apologize for voting against a corporate tax giveaway, for fighting the GOP's plan to decimate Medicare or for calling out the President's decision to outsource his Supreme Court nomination to far-right special interests. However, when the President speaks, Republican donors listen. The last time the President held a rally in PA he raised an estimated $1 million for my opponent -- just imagine what he could do tonight.

**_[The only way we can keep up is if grassroots supporters like you make a financial investment in this campaign -- can you make a $5 donation today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181010_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

I'm proud of my record, and I have no intention of letting the President's attacks against me go unanswered. Pennsylvanians deserve someone who will stand with them, not with corporations -- that's what's on the ballot in November, and it's a race we cannot afford to lose.

**Before President Trump speaks tonight, will you join me in standing up for PA?**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181010_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181010_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: betofortexas.com
subject: our secret weapon:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We counted it up, and not only are we up against Cruz, his PAC and his
super PAC: we’re up against ELEVEN outside groups that are spending
millions in Texas to try to tip the scales in Cruz’s favor.

But we don’t need
mega-donors or super PACs in our corner. YOU are our secret weapon. YOU
are the reason we’re able to keep running our campaign the right way:
powered by people, not PACs.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181010&t=1019&akid=17115%2E444211%2Edd5Mmn ]Can you give a contribution to
Beto’s campaign today to help us unseat Ted Cruz?

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181010&t=1020&akid=17115%2E444211%2Edd5Mmn ]Contribute
$3
»

Every grassroots donation you give sends a powerful message to Cruz and
each of the ten groups in his corner: we’re powered by people, and we’re
not backing down.

When Beto kicked off his campaign for Senate, we knew it wouldn’t be a
fair fight. We knew that Cruz would tap into the network of donors he
built during his failed bid for president in 2016. And we knew Cruz would
rely on PACs, super PACs and mega-donors to prop up his campaign when the
times got tough.

And yet, Beto still made the choice to reject PACs and the
special-interest groups. He never wanted you to have to doubt for one
second who he answers to.

Beto is running a winning campaign by getting back to the basics: he’s
visited with Texans in each of our state’s 254 counties to learn more
about the issues that matter to their communities. And by relying on
grassroots donations alone, we’ve out-raised Senator Cruz time and time
again.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181010&t=1021&akid=17115%2E444211%2Edd5Mmn ]We can win this -- but only if we work our hearts out for these final
few weeks of the campaign. Help our campaign give Cruz and his
special-interest backers a run for their money. Rush
a grassroots donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign right now.

They might try to out-spend us, but they’ll never out-work us. Thank you.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181010&t=1022&akid=17115%2E444211%2Edd5Mmn ]Contribute
$3
»

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=17115%2E444211%2Edd5Mmn

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: why I travel our district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
When I was sworn in for my first term to serve Arizona's First District, I made myself a promise: I would travel as much as possible, hearing from constituents in both our rural and urban communities,
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e90/1a8421e1/19a41284f/494d7b85/3010867672/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, AZ-01 is one of the largest congressional districts in the country. It's a beautiful, sprawling district, stretching across much of Northeastern Arizona and covering many of our state's gorgeous public lands -- including the Grand Canyon. When I was sworn in for my first term to serve Arizona's First District, I made myself a promise: I would travel as much as possible, hearing from constituents in both our rural and urban communities, to ensure that I would always stay in touch with our district's hardworking families. **I 'm proud to have kept that promise, friends.** Over the past year and a half, I have spent only about 30 nights in my home, and I have put tens of thousands of miles traveling all over our district. [](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e90/1a8421e1/19a41284f/494d7b86/3010867672/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJzeGZYMD0iOiIxMCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000") I promise to continue keeping such a robust constituent outreach schedule -- but my first re-election contest is coming up in only 27 days, and I must win on November 6th to continue serving our communities in Congress. **[I'm writing today to ask you to chip in to support my efforts with a donation of any size, friends.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I'm the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, so nothing is guaranteed.** Serving Arizonans in Congress has been the honor of my life. I promise to keep fighting for you, but I must win this tight race first, [**so any support you can give my team is sincerely appreciated.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.10_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e90/1a8421e1/19a41284f/494d7b89/3010867672/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e90/1a8421e1/19a41284f/494d7b8a/3010867672/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e90/1a8421e1/19a41284f/494d7b8b/3010867672/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Bob Corney, Team Bredesen
subject: Aren’t you proud?
body:
|
#
Peter -- Phil Bredesen just wrapped up his final debate against Congresswoman Blackburn, where he made the choice we’re giving voters crystal clear. And I just wanted to ask -- **aren’t you proud?** Aren’t you proud to be standing with a campaign that’s bringing people together to get things done? Aren’t you proud to be standing against the toxic partisanship and bickering of the Washington Swamp? Aren’t you proud to be standing with someone who will lead us to do big things in our country again? **After tonight’s debate in Knoxville, I sure am. And I bet you are, too.** Peter, you and I both recognize that our country needs more leaders who are focused on getting things done -- not the same hyper-partisan bickering that Congresswoman Blackburn has fueled during her 16 years in Washington. That’s why Governor Bredesen is applying for the job. And if enough of us keep pitching in and doing what we can to support this campaign, the Washington Swamp won’t stand a chance. That’s why I’m asking: **If you’re proud to be a part of our team, can you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us finish this race strong? clean_body: | Peter -- Phil Bredesen just wrapped up his final debate against Congresswoman Blackburn, where he made the choice we’re giving voters crystal clear. And I just wanted to ask -- aren’t you proud? Aren’t you proud to be standing with a campaign that’s bringing people together to get things done? Aren’t you proud to be standing against the toxic partisanship and bickering of the Washington Swamp? Aren’t you proud to be standing with someone who will lead us to do big things in our country again? After tonight’s debate in Knoxville, I sure am. And I bet you are, too. Peter, you and I both recognize that our country needs more leaders who are focused on getting things done -- not the same hyper-partisan bickering that Congresswoman Blackburn has fueled during her 16 years in Washington. That’s why Governor Bredesen is applying for the job. And if enough of us keep pitching in and doing what we can to support this campaign, the Washington Swamp won’t stand a chance. That’s why I’m asking: If you’re proud to be a part of our team, can you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us finish this race strong? Monday night is our final mid-month deadline of the election, and your support will be critical to making sure we have the resource we need to tune out attacks and turn out voters. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being with us every step of the way, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

subject: Canvass kick-off with Martin!

body:

| | | Friend,

As one of Martin's top supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that Martin will be hosting a canvass kick-off for our New Mexico For All campaign on Saturday, and you're invited to join him! I've included the event details below, and our team really hopes you can join us on Saturday as we take back our state and our country!

**Event:** Canvass Kick-Off with Martin
**When:** Saturday October 13, at 10:00 am
**Where:** 1520 Deborah Road SE, Rio Rancho, NM 87124

name: Marga Coulp
subject: Strafford County Town Hall!
body:
Derek, We have 27 days until a very important mid-term election. **Our friend and U.S Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards understands what it means to put service before self.** His background as a veteran and former police chief gives Eddie **an appreciation for listening to his community** on how to better serve it. That is why we are supporting Eddie. **His values and commitment to community are what New Hampshire needs.** A cornerstone of his campaign has been getting out and listening to the public, which is why Eddie has asked us to invite you to his next town hall meeting. Here are the details: **A Commitment to Service: A Strafford County Town Hall with Eddie Edwards.** Where: Turbocam's B2 Facility
38 Redemption Rd, Barrington, NH 03825 When: Thursday, October 11th at 6:30 pm We look forward to seeing you on Thursday. clean_body: Derek, We have 27 days until a very important mid-term election. Our friend and U.S Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards understands what it means to put service before self. His background as a veteran and former police chief gives Eddie an appreciation for listening to his community on how to better serve it. That is why we are supporting Eddie. His values and commitment to community are what New Hampshire needs. A cornerstone of his campaign has been getting out and listening to the public, which is why Eddie has asked us to invite you to his next town hall meeting. Here are the details: A Commitment to Service: A Strafford County Town Hall with Eddie Edwards. Where: Turbocam's B2 Facility 38 Redemption Rd, Barrington, NH 03825 When: Thursday, October 11th at 6:30 pm We look forward to seeing you on Thursday. \- Marga Coulp, Former Strafford County GOP Vice Chair | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: BREAKING: Kemp attacks voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Brian Kemp's office has put a hold on processing 53,000 voter registrations. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa89c/34a064cc/fcb58e3/70dcb38/2060460015/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - The AP just broke the news that Brian Kemp's office has put a hold on processing 53,000 voter registrations. Yes, _that_ Brian Kemp - Stacey's Republican opponent for Governor. 53,000 unprocessed registrations means 53,000 Georgians who registered to vote might not be able to vote in the midterms. _And a full 70% of those registrations are from Black Georgians!_ **[We have to fight back right now. Rush a $3 donation to our Voter Protection Fund to help our team fight Kemp's attempts to suppress the vote >>](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa89c/34a064cc/fcb58e3/70dcb39/2060460015/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEwMTguMy1hIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101018.3-a")** Secretary Kemp's blatant attack on Black Georgians is unacceptable, but this isn't the first time he's tried to stack the deck in his favor. Since 2012, Kemp's office has cancelled over 1.4 million voter registrations. Nearly 670,000 registrations were cancelled last year alone. But we won't let Brian Kemp cheat his way to victory. No matter what the other side throws our way, we can fight back if we have the resources to protect the vote. ****[Help us by rushing a donation to our Voter Protection Fund right away - we don't have a minute to spare.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa89c/34a064cc/fcb58e3/70dcb39/2060460015/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEwMTguMy1hIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101018.3-a")**** Every American's right to vote is sacred, and Georgians won't tolerate these attacks on our most basic civil liberties. Team Abrams is going all-out to hold Brian Kemp accountable and to ensure that every eligible Georgian's right to vote is protected. -Team Abrams
---

We're moving in the right direction in CA-25! Peter,

When Linda first introduced you to Katie Hill back in September, she told you about a fighter for greater opportunity, rejecting corporate donations in an amazing effort to take down one of Paul Ryan's most entrenched supporters: Republican Congressman Steve Knight

**With your help, in three months we 'll be able to introduce Katie as "Congresswoman Hill."**

A new poll has Katie Hill up FOUR POINTS, 50% to 46%, in California's 25th District. **[Can you donate $4 or more to ensure that she keeps this lead?](http://ca.voteforlinda. As Executive Director of People Assisting the Homeless (PATH), Katie helped thousands of Californians find permanent housing. She knows that the best way to fix a problem is to hit at its roots -- and in a Republican-controlled Washington, those roots come all the way back to California's 25th.

[**We can 't afford any slip-ups. Can you Donate to help bring home Katie's victory?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. If we don't win Katie's district, odds are we don't win back the House majority -- and then, can you imagine what Donald Trump and Paul Ryan would do?

So let's go win this!

-Team Sanchez

name: Tina Smith
subject: Chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Any loss of enthusiasm could tip this race.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181010PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, I voted "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court -- and while it's been a short time, we have seen Trump's base attack me again and again for my vote. I won't be intimidated, but, with less than a month left until Election Day and Trump targeting Minnesota, I am worried that we could lose momentum in the race. **A new NPR/PBS NewsHour/Marist poll showed the "Democratic enthusiasm advantage that has defined the 2018 campaign up to this point has disappeared."** And we know Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, so any loss of Democratic enthusiasm or momentum could tip this Senate race towards Republicans. That's why I'm asking you: [**Can you make your first contribution before midnight so we can win this critical race in November? We need to keep our ads on the air to counter the big Republican spending against us and we 're counting on your contributions to do it.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota. clean_body: Any loss of enthusiasm could tip this race. | " Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=" Friend, I voted "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court -- and while it's been a short time, we have seen Trump's base attack me again and again for my vote. I won't be intimidated, but, with less than a month left until Election Day and Trump targeting Minnesota, I am worried that we could lose momentum in the race. A new NPR/PBS NewsHour/Marist poll showed the "Democratic enthusiasm advantage that has defined the 2018 campaign up to this point has disappeared." And we know Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, so any loss of Democratic enthusiasm or momentum could tip this Senate race towards Republicans.
